props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: shape
props.description: Select the shape of the component.

props.name: size
props.description: Size the component small, large, or extra large.

props.name: src
props.description: The src attribute for the img element.

props.name: status
props.description: Sets the color context of the status indicator to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Sets the text color of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.
